case_title: BRATTESANI, STEVEN vs. DITANO, MARCO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRATTESANI, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT DITANO, MARCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATTESANI, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DITANO, MARCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3130 FILLMORE/ 185 PIXLEY, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522.
